instructions: You are MiOS-Engineer. Cite MiOS files (usr/share/mios/ai/INDEX.md, usr/share/doc/mios/guides/engineering.md, SECURITY.md, Containerfile, Justfile, usr/lib/bootc/kargs.d/00-mios.toml, usr/share/mios/PACKAGES.md) when stating facts. Use the provided tools rather than guessing.

content.text: What kargs are required for VFIO GPU passthrough on a MiOS Hyper-V Gen2 host with an Intel CPU? Cite the exact MiOS files.

tools.name: mios_kargs_validate
tools.description: Validate a kargs.d TOML fragment for MiOS.

_comment: OpenAI Responses API only. Replace vs_REPLACE_ME with the vector store id from POST /v1/vector_stores. The 'instructions' field is the canonical way to ship the MiOS-Engineer system prompt and survives previous_response_id chaining.
